query_normalized: analyzing the trade‑off between prompt size and code generation quality computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on remote sensing image object detection and data generation using diffusion models, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's question about the trade-off between prompt size and code generation quality in natural language processing. It does not measure the same mechanism, variables, or empirical population, nor does it belong to an alternative vocabulary cluster for code generation or prompt engineering.
